general: Abstract highlights DeFT’s new attention algorithm with KV-Guided Grouping and Flattened Tree KV Splitting to reduce repeated KV cache IO and balance partitions for tree-structured decoding workloads.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on memory-efficient KV cache partitioning for tree-structured LLM inference to cut KV cache IO and improve GPU utilization.

general: SpecEdge is an edge-assisted inference framework splitting workloads between edge and server GPUs, using speculative decoding and pipeline-aware scheduling to raise throughput.
解码策略优化: Abstract mentions splitting LLM workloads via speculative decoding that overlaps edge token creation with server verification while exchanging tokens over the network.

codex_annotation.notes: Edge/server split relies on speculative decoding, so decoding policy optimization is the core preference focus.

general: title: OrthoRank: Token Selection via Sink Token Orthogonality for Efficient LLM inference

abstract: We propose OrthoRank, a dynamic token selection method that ranks tokens by how quickly their hidden states align with the sink token, then keep the most orthogonal ones to lower perplexity and improve LongBench accuracy
解码策略优化: abstract: OrthoRank defines token importance via movement toward the sink token and uses this dynamic selection to boost zero-shot accuracy and throughput at fixed sparsity

codex_annotation.notes: OrthoRank targets LLM inference by selecting which tokens to keep per layer using sink-token orthogonality, trading off fidelity for perplexity/accuracy gains.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向LLM推理阶段的动态token选择，通过层内重要性排序减少计算，属于模型推理过程中的结构侧优化，而非系统调度或参数压缩。

general: Multipole Attention for Efficient Long Context Reasoning 针对需要生成数千 token 的长链思维过程，提出改进推理结构以更有效地处理长上下文。

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要强调通过 Multipole Attention 调整推理结构来支撑长上下文的推理能力。

human_annotation.notes: 标题与摘要片段直接指向长上下文推理效率问题，最匹配“上下文与缓存优化”。未看到足够证据支持其他偏好标签。

模型压缩: By leveraging knowledge distillation and model quantization, Sorbet achieved a highly compressed binary weight model that maintains competitive performance while achieving 27.16× energy savings compared to BERT.
general: Sorbet incorporates PTsoftmax and BitShifting-based PowerNorm to replace energy-intensive softmax and layer normalization, making the transformer-based spiking language model more neuromorphic hardware-compatible.

codex_annotation.notes: Summary highlights energy-efficient small LLM achieved through distillation, quantization, and neuromorphic-friendly ops.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向边缘部署的脉冲神经网络语言模型推理优化，明确包含量化/二值权重压缩；同时通过 PTsoftmax 与 BSPN 替换高能耗操作，属于推理侧算子优化。未见明显关于上下文缓存、解码策略或系统调度层面的贡献。

general: Title and abstract only describe an empirical study of reasoning LLM inference serving and note RLLM competitiveness, without detailing any author-proposed optimization method.

codex_annotation.notes: Only the title and abstract excerpt were provided; no concrete preference-label evidence appeared.

human_annotation.notes: 论文主题更接近RLLM推理服务的实证研究，目标方向可归为系统与调度优化，但当前摘要证据不足以支持标注为具体偏好正例。

general: CDPruner最大化指令条件下的视觉token多样性，去除冗余视觉token以压缩多模态LLM的视觉上下文长度，同时保持性能。
方法训练自由且模型不可知，在多种MLLM上实验表明高删减比例下仍能保持94%准确率，并大幅降低FLOPs与CUDA延迟。
上下文与缓存优化: 核心贡献是通过DPP重写token pruning，选择与指令高度相关的视觉Token子集，从而直接优化视觉上下文长度和上下文处理成本。

codex_annotation.notes: positive 因为摘要强调主要贡献是视觉token pruning以减少上下文代价，故标上下文与缓存优化。

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向 MLLM 推理阶段的视觉 token pruning，属于多模态 LLM 推理优化。', '方法是 training-free 的输入 token 子集选择，不涉及内核实现或系统调度本身，也不是典型权重量化/蒸馏式模型压缩。']

general: Title emphasizes efficient multimodal spatial reasoning via dynamic/asymmetric routing for MLLMs, but the abstract only notes visualization-of-thought enabling multimodal spatial reasoning without naming a specific optimization tag.

human_annotation.notes: 标题直接强调 Dynamic and Asymmetric Routing，属于面向多模态推理路径的结构/路由优化；摘要未体现缓存、调度、算子内核或压缩重点。

模型结构侧推理优化: Abstract argues that causal mask strategies inherited from LLMs are insufficient for vision tokens in the prefill stage, and strictly masking future positions for vision queries hinders leveraging future semantic context for accurate inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Causal mask modification is framed as the core inference-structure change for autoregressive VLMs.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦VLM推理阶段的causal mask/attention设计，核心是调整视觉token在prefill阶段的注意力掩码约束，属于推理时的模型结构侧优化；摘要未直接涉及缓存、调度、内核或压缩。

general: Large language models (LLMs) face a decoding-phase bottleneck from expanding KV cache sizes, and TidalDecode reduces token selection overhead without sacrificing generation quality while cutting latency by up to 2.1×.
解码策略优化: TidalDecode leverages spatial coherence in sparse attention by pre-selecting high-attention tokens via a few full-attention layers and letting other layers reuse those tokens, thereby keeping sparse attention fast and accurate for decoding.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution is the decoding algorithm/system that persistently selects tokens for sparse attention to speed up LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向LLM解码阶段的稀疏注意力推理优化，重点落在KV cache/长上下文瓶颈、解码系统加速与跨层位置持久稀疏注意力；未明显涉及模型压缩。

general: CogVLA introduces instruction-driven routing and sparsification in a three-stage architecture for vision-language-action models to cut post-training overhead while preserving end-to-end coherence.
模型结构侧推理优化: EFA-Routing selectively aggregates instruction-aware visual tokens, LFP-Routing prunes language-side tokens, and CAtten couples causal vision-language attention with parallel action decoding, so the core contribution remaps the inference structure for efficiency.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution reshapes the inference architecture via routing/pruning rather than purely kernel, system, or decoding tweaks.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过指令驱动路由、token 压缩与剪枝来降低 VLA/VLM 推理开销，并用耦合注意力维持动作生成质量，属于明显的推理结构优化，并伴随压缩/稀疏化特征。

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: Title focuses on distilling LLMs into small models for sequential recommendation, and the abstract only restates the SR task (predicting next item) without specifying which optimization target is the main contribution.

codex_annotation.notes: Abstract lacks any clear evidence for the preferred optimization labels, so I marked it negative.

human_annotation.notes: 题目明确是序列推荐；“Distilling ... into Small”直接表明通过蒸馏将大模型压缩为小模型，归入模型压缩。

上下文与缓存优化: Sparse RAG selectively decodes by attending only to highly relevant caches and trims the number of retrieved documents loaded during decoding to speed inference.
general: Design combines per-document assessment with generation to cut long-range attention costs while maintaining quality across datasets.

codex_annotation.notes: Sparse context selection is the main contribution, improving latency by optimizing which retrieved contexts enter the decoding process.

general: 这是RAG检索的优化，不是模型推理加速

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过稀疏上下文选择与按需访问相关缓存来加速 RAG 推理，重点落在解码阶段的注意力裁剪与上下文/缓存利用优化；未体现模型压缩。

general: The increasing demand for long-context generation has made the KV cache in large language models a bottleneck in memory consumption.

PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle, turning the query-key inner product into a table lookup while maintaining downstream performance.
上下文与缓存优化: Quantizing the cache to lower bit widths is an effective way to reduce memory costs; however, previous methods struggle with key cache quantization due to outliers, resulting in suboptimal performance… PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and polar angle, which alleviates channel-wise outliers and makes them well-suited for key cache quantization, accelerating decoding.

codex_annotation.notes: PolarQuant’s core contribution is a KV cache quantization method that directly tackles cache bottlenecks for long-context LLM decoding, so only the context/cache optimization preference applies.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向 LLM 长上下文场景的 KV cache 量化，并通过极坐标表示同时带来解码加速；更偏缓存优化，其次可视为量化压缩。

算子与内核优化: The attention mechanism of a transformer has a quadratic complexity, leading to high inference costs and latency for long sequences... We propose a simple, novel, and effective procedure for correcting this distributional shift, bringing the distribution of sparse attention outputs closer to that of quadratic attention... Our method can maintain approximately 98.5% sparsity over full quadratic attention, making our model 32 times faster than Flash Attention 2 when processing 1M token prefills.

codex_annotation.notes: Corrects sparse attention distribution shifts to match quadratic attention, recovering accuracy while keeping very high sparsity and delivering 32× speedup.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 长上下文稀疏注意力推理，通过 delta correction 缓解 prefill-to-decoding 分布偏移；更偏向注意力/推理结构优化，并涉及长上下文阶段的 prefill-decoding 对齐。

general: ScaleKV针对VAR架构提出按层区分drafters与refiners、按比例管理KV cache的分层压缩，使推理缓存占用降至原来的10%。
VAR模型推理中KV cache呈指数增长导致内存与冗余，而ScaleKV通过多尺度缓存策略优化了多尺度推理流水线。
上下文与缓存优化: ScaleKV根据各层的缓存需求与注意力模式，有差异地管理KV cache以降低内存开销，与摘要中多次强调的cache压缩直接对应。

codex_annotation.notes: 论文主攻VAR推理中KV cache压缩，标题与摘要都聚焦在上下文缓存管理，因此只标上下文与缓存优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向视觉自回归生成推理的 KV cache 压缩与分层/分尺度缓存管理，最匹配上下文与缓存优化；同时包含按层与按尺度进行差异化资源分配，符合系统与调度优化。未见解码策略本身改造、模型压缩训练或算子内核级优化。

general: Title and abstract describe CodeGEMM as a codebook-centric GEMM kernel that replaces dequantization with precomputed inner products to cut latency and cache pressure for quantized LLM inference.
算子与内核优化: The kernel stores inner products between centroids and activations in a lightweight Psumbook so inference gathers partial sums directly, eliminating per-element lookups and enabling systematic latency–memory–accuracy trade-off exploration.

codex_annotation.notes: Kernel 层面优化是文章的主要贡献。

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心贡献是面向量化 LLM 推理的 GEMM 内核设计，而非提出新的压缩方法本身。', '量化与 codebook 是问题设定与目标场景，因此更适合作为 target_preference_labels 中的“模型压缩”。']

模型结构侧推理优化: PPE is a novel encoding operator that disentangles 3D positions in the token dimension so each compressed token carries positions from multiple originals, explicitly preserving spatiotemporal structure during visual token compression.
general: Applied to state-of-the-art token merging frameworks, PPE yields 2%–5% gains across MMBench, TextVQA, and VideoMME, showing positional preservation improves MLLM reasoning.

codex_annotation.notes: Positive because the abstract describes PPE as the authors’ main operator-level contribution for more efficient multimodal LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是针对多模态大模型视觉token压缩时的结构保持与压缩算子设计，属于推理阶段的模型结构优化，而非系统调度优化。

general: Quantization via reduced-precision weights is proposed to tame the computation and memory demands of LLM deployment on constrained devices.
解码策略优化: Progressive Mixed-Precision Decoding (PMPD) gradually lowers precision deeper in the generated sequence, with schedulers guiding the precision shifts, to ease decoding memory limits.

codex_annotation.notes: PMPD is a phase-aware precision schedule for LLM decoding that trades precision for throughput while retaining quality, yielding large speedups over fp16 and uniform quantization baselines.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 mixed-precision decoding，并以量化/低比特精度为核心手段提升效率，属于解码策略优化与模型压缩交叉方向。

general: SpeCache offloads the full KV cache to CPU memory, dynamically fetching important KV pairs via low-precision copies and speculatively prefetching them before each decoding step to overlap prefetching and computation.
上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache offloads KV cache to CPU memory and dynamically fetches/prefetches KV pairs based on importance to keep long-sequence memory usage low without retraining.

codex_annotation.notes: Leverages speculative prefetching from CPU-resident KV cache to reduce VRAM pressure on long-context LLM decoding.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 的分层存储、按重要性回取与推测式预取，属于缓存优化并带有系统调度特征。', '虽然摘要提到 high KV cache compression ratio，但方法重点不是量化/剪枝式模型压缩，而是无遗忘的缓存卸载与预取。']

算子与内核优化: HiP reduces attention’s time complexity to O(T log T) and space complexity to O(T) via attention-locality-aware tree-search top-k selection, delivering better performance than random pruning while remaining training-free. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))

KV cache offloading stores only O(log T) tokens on GPU while keeping decoding throughput, enabling subquadratic prefill/decoding latencies for long-context LLM serving on commodity GPUs. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))
general: Training-free Hierarchically Pruned Attention plus KV cache offloading let pretrained LLMs scale over a million tokens without retraining, unlocking long-context applications on commodity hardware. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.09827?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on deploying pretrained LLMs with a new attention mechanism that prunes subquadratic computation and offloads KV cache to support extreme context lengths without retraining. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.notes: 标题明确聚焦于 Transformer serving framework 与 pruned attention，属于推理/服务阶段优化；摘要强调长上下文能力，因此可归入上下文与缓存优化，同时层次化剪枝注意力属于模型结构侧推理优化。

general: Star Attention is a two-phase block-sparse approximation that shards attention across hosts to cut memory and inference time for Transformer-based LLMs handling long sequences.
模型结构侧推理优化: The method introduces blockwise-local attention across hosts followed by sequence-global attention to cached tokens, explicitly restructuring the inference attention pattern to support long contexts.

codex_annotation.notes: Star Attention’s new attention pattern is presented as the main contribution for efficient long-context LLM inference, so the analysis tag reflects that structural inference optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长上下文LLM推理，通过块稀疏注意力、跨主机分片与缓存token全局访问联合优化推理效率，属于明显的正样本。

general: DyVTE uses lightweight hyper-networks to perceive text token status and remove visual tokens after a certain layer, addressing visual redundancy and improving MLLM inference efficiency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19628?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: DyVTE dynamically exits visual tokens once text tokens capture sufficient image information, effectively shortening the visual context and trimming redundant tokens. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19628?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: The paper empirically characterizes visual-token redundancy in MLLMs and proposes DyVTE to drop visual context once text has enough data.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理阶段的动态视觉 token 退出，属于通过模型侧机制减少冗余计算的推理优化方向。

general: KV caching is a fundamental technique for accelerating LLM inference by reusing key-value pairs, but its effectiveness under limited memory is highly sensitive to the eviction policy.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心明确围绕 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 复用与受限内存下的淘汰策略优化；标题中的 query load balancing 也指向调度/负载均衡视角。

general: LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores for KV cache entries, enabling high-accuracy eviction without generating drafts.
The method reduces eviction cost up to 14.5× and significantly speeds up time-to-first-token (TTFT) while improving long-context understanding benchmarks by ~25%.
The work targets key–value caching’s growth with input length, so the surrogate response prediction directly optimizes cache eviction policies.
上下文与缓存优化: The cache size grows linearly with sequence length, and LookaheadKV predicts importance scores for cached KV entries to evict the least useful ones without costly draft generation.

codex_annotation.notes: 论文集中优化 LLMS 推理中的 KV cache 管理，通过新型重要性估计模块提升长上下文 KV 剔除的准确度和效率，主贡献即上下文/缓存选取策略。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向长上下文推理的 KV Cache eviction / compression 优化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化；未明显涉及解码策略或系统调度层面的核心方法贡献。

general: While many diffusion models have achieved impressive results in real-world video super-resolution by generating rich and realistic details, their reliance on multi-step sampling leads to slow inference.
模型压缩: Our approach distills a large diffusion Transformer (DiT) teacher DOVE equipped with 3D spatio-temporal attentions into a pruned 2D Stable Diffusion-based AdcSR backbone, augmented with lightweight 1D temporal convolutions, achieving significantly higher efficiency.

codex_annotation.notes: Improved ADC distills a heavy DiT into a compressed AdcVSR with dual-head adversarial distillation, yielding 95% fewer parameters and 8× speed-up while keeping temporal consistency.

human_annotation.notes: 核心贡献是针对扩散式 Real-VSR 的剪枝与蒸馏压缩，主要对应模型压缩；加速来自压缩后的轻量化模型，而非系统/调度层优化。

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策

general: Title states the work accelerates linear recurrent neural networks for edge deployment using unstructured sparsity.
Abstract highlights the need for hardware-aware optimizations to minimize latency and energy when running these sequence models in constrained streaming environments.
模型压缩: Title explicitly couples acceleration of linear recurrent neural networks with unstructured sparsity, indicating the core method is compressive sparsification to speed inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Assuming “unstructured sparsity” is presented as the primary optimization rather than a supporting implementation detail, which justifies selecting the compression-related preference label.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心聚焦边缘部署加速与资源约束下的硬件感知优化；“非结构化稀疏”直接对应模型压缩信号。

general: LLaVA-Mini introduces modality pre-fusion to fuse visual information into text tokens in advance, enabling extreme compression of vision tokens fed to the LLM backbone down to one token.
Experiments show LLaVA-Mini reduces FLOPs by 77% while preserving multimodal understanding with very few vision tokens, indicating the main contribution is reducing the number of context tokens.

codex_annotation.notes: Efficient LMM design reduces vision-token count before the LLM, aligning clearly with context-level optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过模态预融合与单视觉 token 设计降低多模态推理开销，明显属于多模态 LLM；偏好上更直接对应上下文 token 压缩与模型结构侧推理优化，而非系统调度或算子内核层优化。

general: NestedFP overlays FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters so both precisions share the same memory footprint and enables SLO-aware precision selection during LLM serving.
It leverages a compact data format for that overlay and a specialized GEMM kernel optimized for the format to keep throughput and quality stable across FP8 and FP16 modes.
算子与内核优化: NestedFP’s main contributions are the overlay data format and the specialized GEMM kernel tailored to that format, which directly implement the dual-precision support within the inference kernels.

codex_annotation.notes: Supports dynamic FP16/FP8 switching for LLM serving with minimal memory overhead and throughput/quality impact, making it suitable for SLO-driven inference workloads.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦LLM推理服务中的双精度切换与内存复用，核心贡献覆盖SLO感知调度、专用GEMM内核以及以共享FP16占用实现FP8/FP16双模型支持的压缩式表示；未见与上下文或KV缓存优化直接相关的内容。

general: The abstract frames long-context LLM inference as bottlenecked by the exploding KV cache during decoding and highlights LycheeDecode achieving up to 2.7x speedup at 128K context length while maintaining quality.
解码策略优化: LycheeDecode is described as an efficient decoding method centered on a fine-grained hybrid-head attention mechanism (with HardKuma-based selection) that dynamically routes crucial tokens through retrieval heads and shares them with sparse heads to deliver high-throughput long-context decoding.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长上下文 LLM 推理加速，核心是基于混合头稀疏注意力的解码与 KV/关键 token 复用；包含硬件高效 top-k 与 kernels 表述，但未明显涉及系统级调度。

general: We introduce GateSkip, a residual-stream gating mechanism that enables token-wise layer skipping in decoder-only LMs and ranks tokens by gate to skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget.

The smooth, differentiable gates are fine-tuned on pretrained models to save up to 15% compute on long-form reasoning while retaining >90% accuracy and match baseline quality near 50% savings for instruction-tuned models.
模型结构侧推理优化: Each Attention/MLP branch is equipped with a sigmoid-linear gate that compresses the branch’s output before it re-enters the residual stream, enabling tokens to skip layers during inference and offering insight into transformer information flow.

codex_annotation.notes: Layer-level gating for adaptive compute targeting inference brings the main contribution.

human_annotation.notes: 工作核心是通过残差门控实现按 token 的层跳过，属于模型结构侧的推理计算优化，而非解码策略本身。

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Portcullis is a privacy-preserving gateway that anonymizes sensitive data in prompts, mediates with third-party LLMs, and guarantees secure processing within encrypted memory.

codex_annotation.notes: Focus is on building a verifiable privacy gateway for third-party LLM inference, not on the optimization labels provided.

human_annotation.notes: 该工作主要面向第三方 LLM 推理场景下的隐私保护与可验证系统基础设施，属于 AI 系统/基础设施方向；虽提到并行替换与可扩展性，但不构成给定偏好标签中的优化主题。

general: HiRED adapts CLS-token attention per image partition to allocate a fixed token budget, selecting the most informative visual tokens and delivering 4.7× higher throughput, 78% lower latency, and 14% GPU memory savings on LLaVA-Next-7B inference.
上下文与缓存优化: Token dropping within the fixed-budget pipeline trims the number of visual tokens, reducing memory usage by 30% for batch size 4 and preventing OOM while preserving throughput and latency benefits, so the core contribution is context/token-budget optimization.

codex_annotation.notes: Token-dropping strategy for high-resolution VLM inference, so positive tier with context/cache optimization as the main supported label.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是针对高分辨率VLM推理阶段的视觉token裁剪与预算分配，属于模型结构侧推理优化，而非缓存、调度或算子内核优化。

general: Infinite Pixel Learning (IPL) slices UHD multi-exposure input sequences and applies attention cache processing to fuse dynamic scenes on a single consumer-grade GPU in real-time (>40fps).
上下文与缓存优化: The method develops an attention cache technique, similar to KV cache for infinite data streams, plus attention cache compression to reduce the device’s storage burden, explicitly targeting long-sequence handling.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on context/cache mechanisms adapted from LLM-style infinite stream processing to enable UHD fusion on constrained hardware.

human_annotation.notes: 该工作本体属于计算机视觉中的UHD多曝光图像融合；与偏好最直接相关的是长序列处理中的缓存与压缩机制，未见算子/内核级优化的明确证据。

general: Title and abstract describe recovering and compressing multimodal vision tokens guided by text information so large multimodal models keep important context while reducing token count.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract states the method uses question-text similarity to recover meaningful visual tokens and merge less important ones, compressing visual tokens to about 10% of the original size to speed up training/inference for large multimodal models.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要明确以文本指导的视觉 token 恢复机制来压缩视觉 context，保持关键信息并提高推理效率。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型中的视觉 token 压缩与恢复，通过文本引导的动态恢复机制在大幅减少视觉 token 数量的同时保持性能，最匹配“LLM/多模态”和“模型压缩”。

general: Abstract emphasizes learning visual prompts to upgrade neural network sparsification and shows experiments across architectures/datasets that outperform existing pruning methods.
模型压缩: VPNs framework customizes visual prompts to promote superior weight sparsity and conducts joint optimization for pruning, demonstrating better performance and transferability than state-of-the-art pruning algorithms.

codex_annotation.notes: Data-model co-design applies visual prompts specifically to support pruning in vision architectures, framing pruning as the main contribution rather than system-level or decoding changes.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是计算机视觉场景下的网络剪枝/稀疏化，通过视觉提示优化稀疏子网发现，明显属于模型压缩，不属于 LLM 上下文缓存或系统调度优化。

general: Abstract frames the work as realizing lightweight learning-based super-resolution for real-time computer graphics, focusing on reducing computational demands of SR models rather than a specific decoding/cache/system/kernel/structure/compression optimization technique.

human_annotation.notes: 论文主题是面向实时计算机图形的图像超分辨率，属于计算机视觉方向。摘要强调轻量化与降低计算开销，但未明确出现解码、缓存、调度、算子内核、压缩等具体推理优化技术，因此不标为正例；可视为与模型结构侧轻量化目标相关的域内样本。

general: ST3 is introduced to accelerate MLLM inference without retraining, yielding ~2× speedup and ~30% of the original LLaVA KV cache while keeping performance stable across datasets.
上下文与缓存优化: PVTP prunes inattentive visual tokens across layers and VTA dynamically reduces the number of visual tokens per layer as decoding progresses, cutting redundant KV cache and attention work.

codex_annotation.notes: Token trimming framework (PVTP + VTA) focuses on reducing redundant visual tokens and KV cache usage to speed up multimodal LLM decoding.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理加速，核心是解码过程中的视觉 token 裁剪与 KV cache 降低；不属于模型压缩训练范式。

general: MPQ-DM is a mixed-precision quantization method for diffusion models that uses outlier-driven bit-width allocation and time-smoothed relation distillation to keep accuracy at 2–4 bit settings.
模型压缩: The method specifically targets quantization errors under extremely low bit-widths by allocating mixed precision per channel and distilling representations between quantized and full-precision diffusion models.

codex_annotation.notes: 强调在极低比特量化下恢复性能；实验展示 W2A4 下显著优于其他量化方法。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是扩散模型在极低比特下的量化压缩与精度恢复，属于 VLM/Diffusion 方向下的模型压缩。

general: Token compression techniques, such as token merging and pruning, are essential for alleviating the substantial computational burden caused by the proliferation of tokens within attention mechanisms.
We introduce Multimodal Promptable Token Merging (MPTM) to eliminate redundant tokens by measuring proximity to the multimodal prompt, preserving informative ones.
Applied to multimodal diffusion models, MPTM maintains output quality while achieving a 2.9-fold throughput increase.

codex_annotation.notes: MPTM’s core contribution is prompt-aware token pruning/merging to cut attention cost in diffusion attention, fitting the 上下文与缓存优化 preference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向 diffusion/multimodal diffusion 的 token merging 与冗余 token 消减，属于生成模型中的压缩式推理加速；未见系统调度或缓存层面的主要贡献。

general: The paper targets MoE-based LLMs, noting that All-to-All communication becomes a bottleneck as fine-grained structures activate more experts and increase overhead.
系统与调度优化: Addressing the All-to-All communication overhead in MoE training/inference is presented as the main efficiency challenge, implying the contribution is a communication-aware system optimization.

codex_annotation.notes: Communication efficiency is the central contribution, so only the system/scheduling optimization label is justified.

human_annotation.notes: 论文面向LLM中的MoE结构，核心问题是降低专家激活带来的All-to-All通信开销，并通过结构设计提升训练与推理效率。

general: SVS refines pruned weights to balance singular values so that compressed GAN/ Diffusion models fine-tune faster and yield better compression without extra training costs.

codex_annotation.notes: Singular Value Scaling explicitly targets pruned-weight compression for generative models, matching the stated preference label.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是生成模型压缩，方法通过奇异值缩放改进剪枝权重初始化，覆盖GAN与Diffusion；不属于系统与调度优化。

general: ScaleOT introduces a layerwise lossy compression algorithm that uses reinforcement learning to weigh each layer and replaces raw LLM layers with lightweight harmonizers for scalable emulators.
They further present a rank reduction method to compress original LLM layers, enhancing privacy with negligible utility loss.

codex_annotation.notes: ScaleOT’s core contribution is compressing LLM layers (lossy layer replacement plus rank reduction) to enable privacy-preserving offsite tuning with minimal degradation.

human_annotation.notes: 论文主体是面向LLM的离线调优压缩框架，核心贡献集中在分层有损压缩、层替换与低秩压缩，明显属于模型压缩；“系统与调度优化”证据不足，未纳入。

general: Title: Apollo-Forecast: Overcoming Aliasing and Inference Speed Challenges in Language Models for Time Series Forecasting
Abstract snippet: Encoding time series into tokens and using language models for processing has been shown to substantially augment the models' ability to generalize to unseen tasks.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要未具体陈述哪种优化策略是作者的主要贡献，无法归入指定偏好标签。

human_annotation.notes: 论文面向语言模型在时间序列预测中的混叠与推理速度问题，标题直接指向推理阶段效率/结构改进；给定摘要片段不足以支持缓存、调度、内核或压缩方向。

general: RTLIR operates at the token level, deciding whether to retain each token to refine the input and identify the key context that most impacts generation quality.
The agent learns token-selection probabilities based on the current state, enabling a more targeted, fine-grained input/data optimization that boosts LLM accuracy by 6%.

codex_annotation.notes: Reinforced token-level selection refines context to improve downstream LLM outputs; key evidence is in the abstract’s explanation of RTLIR’s token retention decisions.

human_annotation.notes: 论文属于 LLM 输入优化/提示改写方向，核心是基于强化学习进行 token 级输入筛选，不是解码、KV cache、调度、算子内核、推理结构优化或模型压缩。

general: Serving LLMs requires substantial memory due to KV cache growth with sequence length, motivating cache compression via quantization.
QJL quantizes the KV cache to 3 bits, cuts memory by over fivefold, and runs faster without sacrificing accuracy.
上下文与缓存优化: An effective approach to compress KV cache is quantization, but traditional methods store per-block constants with 1–2 additional bits per value; QJL eliminates that overhead by combining a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform with sign-bit quantization, backed by an asymmetric inner product estimator.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on KV cache quantization for LLM serving, with a lightweight CUDA kernel implementation to keep runtime fast while slashing cache memory.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 量化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化。', '量化压缩方法本身属于模型压缩范畴。', '文中包含 lightweight CUDA kernel 与更快 runtime，可归入算子与内核优化，但不宜扩展到系统与调度优化。']

general: The paper introduces Cache Sparse Representation (CSR), which converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights to shrink memory usage during LLM inference, and NeuralDict to generate the dictionary for the sparse representation, matching KV cache quantization performance while staying functional in memory-constrained settings.

codex_annotation.notes: 关注LLM推理中的KV cache内存瓶颈，提出CSR+NeuralDict实现稀疏表示，主要优化上下文缓存而非模型结构或系统调度。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 稀疏表示与量化压缩，在长上下文和内存受限场景下降低缓存占用。

general: ‘Compression-Aware Computing for Scalable and Sustainable AI’ centers on customizing large-scale generative AI models for memory- and energy-constrained devices.
模型压缩: The framework lets models recognize and adapt to compressed states by integrating compression techniques such as sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to retain performance.

codex_annotation.notes: Talk frames compression-aware computing as the main contribution for making generative models practical on low-cost hardware and highlights downstream benefits (e.g., enabling Alzheimer’s single-cell transcriptomics analysis).

human_annotation.notes: 主题聚焦生成式与大规模AI模型在受限设备上的压缩感知计算，核心对应模型压缩；未见上下文缓存、系统调度或算子内核层面的具体方法证据。

general: Title and abstract emphasize scalable, efficient probabilistic inference across Bayesian deep learning and generative modeling, presenting a new compute paradigm leveraging accelerators plus a discrete-domain inference framework with gradient guidance.
模型压缩: The talk highlights a new compute paradigm that leverages modern accelerators—specifically low-precision and sparsity—to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy, indicating compression-focused inference optimization.

codex_annotation.notes: Talk-style paper focusing on inference-time efficiency improvements rather than novel benchmarks.

human_annotation.notes: ['主题核心是可扩展高效的概率推断，覆盖贝叶斯深度学习与生成建模，不是以 LLM 为唯一主对象。', '“low-precision and sparsity”直接对应压缩/稀疏化方向；“leverages modern accelerators”体现系统实现与推理加速取向。', '离散域利用梯度信息进行更有方向的探索属于推断算法改进，但不直接落入给定偏好标签集合。']

上下文与缓存优化: While 4-bit quantization has emerged as a memory-optimal choice for non-reasoning models and zero-shot tasks across scales, we show that this universal prescription fails for reasoning models, where KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory.

codex_annotation.notes: Shows reasoning-model memory bottlenecks shift from model weights to KV cache, motivating cache-aware memory optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦推理模型的内存最优配置，核心证据直接涉及 KV cache 与量化位宽选择，属于缓存/上下文优化与模型压缩交叉主题。

general: title describes a “low-bit vector quantization of KV cache,” and the abstract calls out the large KV cache size as the reason LLM inference is memory-intensive for large batches and long sequences.
上下文与缓存优化: title highlights “double normalization” for calibration-free low-bit vector quantization of the KV cache, indicating the core contribution is compressing the KV cache to ease inference memory demands.

codex_annotation.notes: Focused on quantizing the KV cache to cut memory pressure during LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 低比特量化，以降低缓存带来的内存开销，属于缓存优化与模型压缩交叉方向。

general: Polar Sparsity shows contextual sparsity can scale to large batch sizes, delivering high-throughput LLM inference acceleration with minimal changes.
模型结构侧推理优化: Selective Head Attention keeps attention head sparsity stable across batches while MLP sparsity vanishes, driving the sparse structural change that enables the 2.2× end-to-end speedups.

codex_annotation.notes: The core contribution is restructuring attention to selectively activate sparse heads, placing the work squarely in model-structure inference optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦大批量 LLM 推理加速，核心贡献在注意力头稀疏与稀疏感知 GPU kernel；未直接讨论 KV cache/上下文管理，也不是典型模型压缩或调度论文。

general: Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate the excessive computational and memory requirements of large language models (LLMs).

human_annotation.notes: 标题与摘要明确聚焦于LLM剪枝/稀疏化，属于模型压缩方向。

general: MUFFIN 是首个神经心理声学编码系统，通过跨频带的向量量化实现高保真音频压缩，并在多种数据集上超越现有音频重建表现。
模型压缩: 提出 Multi-Band Spectral Residual Vector Quantization 机制来在不同频段量化潜在表示，优化比特率分配并保持感知质量，最终实现 12.5 kHz 的高压缩率。

codex_annotation.notes: 强调量化/压缩与感知建模的融合；高压缩 variant 仍保留重建质量，体现主要贡献在模型压缩方向。

human_annotation.notes: 该论文核心是神经音频编码与心理声学压缩，主对象应归为“语音 / 音频”。摘要未体现允许标签中的推理优化或模型压缩取向，因此偏好标签置空。

general: The paper proposes a serving system that consolidates similar experts across fine-tuned MoE LLMs and applies runtime partial reconfiguration so a single GPU can host multiple models with throughput comparable to servicing just one while keeping TTFT low.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on multi-tenant serving efficiency for MoE LLMs rather than structural/model changes.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是多租户单卡上的多MoE-LLM高效服务，重点在服务系统设计与MoE结构级重构，不直接聚焦缓存、解码或底层算子内核优化。

general: SCBench benchmarks long-context LLM inference through a KV cache-centric analysis of generation, compression, retrieval, and loading discussions across multiple shared-context tasks.
上下文与缓存优化: The abstract emphasizes KV cache reuse, compression, and lifecycle stages, and compares long-context methods on their KV cache behaviors, making cache management the core optimization focus.

codex_annotation.notes: The paper’s main contribution is analyzing and benchmarking KV cache management for long-context LLM inference, so context and cache optimization is the dominant qualification.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向长上下文LLM的KV cache中心化评测与分析，属于LLM方向。', '偏好标签同时覆盖缓存复用/加载/检索，混合架构与稀疏机制，以及量化/压缩相关方法。']

上下文与缓存优化: Dynamic-LLaVA dynamically reduces the redundancy of vision context in the prefill stage and decreases the memory and computation overhead of the generated language context during decoding, with tailored sparsification inference for modes including decoding with and without KV cache.

codex_annotation.notes: 根据摘要，本文的核心是通过动态 vision-language 上下文稀疏化在预填充与解码阶段节省内存与计算，明确对应上下文与缓存优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理阶段的视觉-语言上下文稀疏化，核心收益体现在降低解码期计算与 KV cache/上下文内存开销，最匹配“上下文与缓存优化”。

general: Large language models (LLMs) face high computation and memory costs, so the paper presents new directions using SVD as a hardware-independent, tunable solution for LLM compression and introduces Dobi-SVD to tackle truncation and information-loss issues.
模型压缩: Dobi-SVD addresses optimal truncation positions, efficient weight updates, and the injection-induced information loss when applying Singular Value Decomposition to compress LLM weights and activations.

codex_annotation.notes: Abstract frames the main contribution as an SVD-based compression method for LLMs, fitting the model-compression preference.

general: Preble is the first distributed LLM serving platform that targets and optimizes prompt sharing, recognizing that many prompts share repeated context across requests and production deployments are distributed by nature. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: We designed a distributed scheduling system that co-optimizes KV state reuse and computation load-balancing with a new scheduling algorithm and a hierarchical scheduling mechanism to improve distributed serving latency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: The paper centers on distributed prompt scheduling for LLM serving, yielding 1.5X–14.5X average latency and 2X–10X p99 improvements over prior serving systems while reusing cached prompt state across GPUs. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Proposes a static 8-bit per-tensor quantization method for selective state-space models that suppresses activation peaks and uses Hadamard transforms for outlier-free output quantization, enabling weight-activation quantization of Mamba 2.8B and Jamba 52B with minimal accuracy loss.

codex_annotation.notes: Claims the quantized models run with lower latency on Nvidia Orin Nano 8G while retaining cloud and edge applicability.

general: We introduce Encode-Prefill-Decode (EPD) Disaggregation, a novel framework that separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources.

This includes a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving and a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics, leading to large gains in memory efficiency, batch sizes, and SLO attainment compared to systems that do not disaggregate.
系统与调度优化: Unlike current systems, which bundle encoding and prefill together, our approach decouples these steps, unlocking new opportunities and optimizations including resource allocation for disaggregated serving and role-switching to handle workload changes.

codex_annotation.notes: 论文关注大模型多模态推理-serving 的阶段拆分与资源调度优化，从而显著提升关键 SLO，最直接对应系统与调度优化。

general: Title/abstract describe HiFC as a DRAM-free scheme for long-context LLM inference that swaps KV cache pages to SSDs while keeping throughput comparable to DRAM-based swapping.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: “...HiFC enables direct access to SSD-resident memory..., bypassing host DRAM and alleviating PCIe bottlenecks... fine-grained block mapping ... stabilizing latency and throughput under load.” which directly targets KV cache management for long-context inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Positive label because the main contribution is cache swapping for long-context LLM inference; SSD-based KV cache management is the only preference tag supported by the abstract evidence.

general: Title: EPIC: Efficient Position-Independent Caching for Serving Large Language Models, focused on serving efficiency for LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests, but existing context caching requires exact prefix matches, limiting reuse when immutable content is preceded by varying prefixes.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要强调主要贡献是改进上下文缓存以支持 position-independent reuse，这直接对应上下文与缓存优化。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular bricks and co-designs hardware/software so each brick runs on its ideal accelerator, enabling energy-efficient on-device multimodal inference on battery-powered SoCs by breaking monolithic execution and orchestrating an event-driven cascade pipeline.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))
系统与调度优化: The framework’s core is cross-accelerator scheduling that assigns vision, fusion, and decoding modules to GPU/NPU/CPU under unified memory while a lightweight scheduler offloads layers based on battery, memory, and latency needs, plus zero-copy buffer management for dynamic workload offloading.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

codex_annotation.notes: Prototype demos over 20h runtime and outperforms existing frameworks via the co-designed execution system.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

general: Multi model inference, where multiple task-specialized models collaborate to solve complex real-world problems, has recently emerged as a prominent paradigm, particularly in the development of agentic AI systems. However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.
上下文与缓存优化: However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on reusing identical KV cache entries so multi-model inference does not multiply memory usage.

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Authors argue prior LVLM speedups trim image tokens only before or inside the LLM while the costly image encoder still dominates, so they jointly optimize encoder, LLM, and other components for end-to-end acceleration.
上下文与缓存优化: They introduce iLLaVA, a token merging strategy that recycles information from discarded visual tokens to reduce selector load, delivering up to 2× throughput and 4× prefilling time gains and enabling larger models to outperform smaller ones.

codex_annotation.notes: Token merging cuts redundant visual tokens flowing into the LLM, fitting the context/cache optimization focus.

general: 摘要强调 DTP 通过两阶段剪枝显著减少多模态 Mamba LLM 中冗余视觉 token，使推理计算减少近 50% 且同时提高性能，直接支撑模型压缩优化。

codex_annotation.notes: 标题/摘要均围绕多模态 LLM 的 token 剪枝展开，归类为模型压缩。

general: Diffusion models face rising memory and latency, so the authors introduce SVDQuant to quantize weights and activations to 4 bits while co-designing the Nunchaku inference engine that fuses low-rank and low-bit kernels to avoid extra data movement.
模型压缩: SVDQuant absorbs outliers in a low-rank branch and lets a quantized branch handle the residuals, enabling aggressive 4-bit quantization on both weights and activations with reduced memory usage and speedups over prior W4A16 baselines.

codex_annotation.notes: Also supports off-the-shelf low-rank adapters without re-quantization while cutting redundant memory access via the fused inference engine.

general: Autoregressive models generate ultra-long videos chunk-by-chunk, but the sequential process is slow; while caching helps traditional diffusion, existing approaches assume uniform denoising, which fails for the varying similarity patterns across chunks in autoregressive generation, motivating new caching strategies.

codex_annotation.notes: Flow-aware caching tailored to video chunk similarity is introduced to accelerate autoregressive generation.

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Abstract describes SpaceServe as a serving system that decouples modality encoders from the decoder, co-locating them on the same GPU via fine-grained SM partitioning to space-multiplex multimodal LLM execution and avoid idle SM/HBM resources. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))
系统与调度优化: The paper introduces a cost-model-guided Space-Inference Scheduler (SIS) that dynamically assigns SM slices and a Time-Windowed Shortest-Remaining-First policy that batches encoder requests to minimize completion latency and smooth decoder arrivals, signaling that scheduler-driven serving optimization is the main contribution. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))

codex_annotation.notes: Evaluation reports that SpaceServe cuts time-per-output-token by 4.81× on average and up to 28.9× on NVIDIA A100 GPUs, highlighting the system-level throughput gains from this scheduling strategy. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))

general: Post-training quantization framework Bit-DGDM sparsely models activation outliers and uses low-rank decomposition to accelerate inference and reduce FP32 memory by up to 2.8× while matching ultra-low precision (down to 4-bit).

codex_annotation.notes: Quantization is the core contribution, so model compression is the best fitting preference while the diffusion model itself drives the primary research focus.

general: FreeKV is a training-free algorithm-system co-optimization framework to enhance KV cache retrieval efficiency while preserving accuracy in long-context LLM deployments. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))
上下文与缓存优化: FreeKV shifts KV selection and recall off the critical path via speculative retrieval and fine-grained correction, and overlaps hybrid CPU/GPU KV layouts plus double-buffered streamed recall with computation to hide latency, directly boosting KV cache retrieval efficiency with near-lossless accuracy. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))

codex_annotation.notes: Experiments report near-lossless accuracy and up to 13× speedup over prior KV retrieval methods, underscoring the cache-focused optimization. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))

general: We introduce our lightweight, all-in-one automated benchmarking framework that allows users to evaluate LLMs on mobile devices.
We focus on evaluating resource efficiency (memory and power consumption) and harmful output for compressed models on mobile devices.

codex_annotation.notes: Benchmark/reporting study on compressed LLMs across mobile hardware; no new optimization method that matches any preferred tag.

general: Title: Channel-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient Long-Context Inference
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: The key-value (KV) cache plays a vital role in accelerating autoregressive inference for large language models (LLMs). However, its linear memory growth with sequence length poses significant memory bottlenecks, especially in long-context scenarios.

codex_annotation.notes: The work targets KV cache compression via channel-aware mixed-precision quantization to keep long-context inference feasible.
